# coolify_projects (Data Source)

Use this data source to list all Coolify projects.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_projects" "all" {}

output "project_names" {
  value = [for p in data.coolify_projects.all.projects : p.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (Block Set) Filter results by field values. Multiple filters are ANDed together. Multiple values within a filter are ORed. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))

### Read-Only

- `projects` (Attributes List) The list of projects. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects))

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Required:

- `name` (String) The field name to filter by.
- `values` (Set of String) The values to match against. Multiple values are ORed.


<a id="nestedatt--projects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) A description of the project.
- `name` (String) The name of the project.
- `uuid` (String) The unique identifier of the project.
